title: Typing Speed Test
customPlaceholder: Paste or upload your own text to practice typing...
seoDescription: Free online typing speed test in English and Korean (한글 타자). Measure WPM, accuracy, and typing speed. Korean typing practice, 한글 타자 연습, 한글 타이핑 속도 측정. Perfect for job preparation, coding interviews, and speed training.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Typing Speed Test
step1Desc: Select English or Korean as your typing language. Each has unique sentences for practice.
step2Desc: Click Start Test and begin typing the displayed sentence. The timer starts when you type your first character.
step3Desc: After 60 seconds, see your WPM (Words Per Minute) and accuracy score. Practice regularly to improve.
faq1A: WPM (Words Per Minute) is calculated as (correct characters typed ÷ 5) ÷ minutes. One word is standardized as 5 characters.
faq2A: Accuracy = (correct characters ÷ total characters typed) × 100%. Only matching characters count as correct.
faq3Q: Can I practice in both languages?
faq3A: Yes! Switch between English and Korean using the language selector. Each language has its own set of practice sentences.
